summary: Reconcile skill inventory between registry.json (canonical) and compound-engineering.json (consumer)

details.divergence_fixed: task-orchestrator was in compound-engineering.json enabled[] but missing from registry.json
details.resolution: Added task-orchestrator to registry.json with metadata derived from AGENTS.md skill definition
details.consistency_script: scripts/check-skill-consistency.mjs — enforces enabled[] is strict subset of registry keys
details.canonical_rule: registry.json is single source of truth; consumer configs must reference only registered skills

test_results.consistency_check: node scripts/check-skill-consistency.mjs → PASS (15/15 enabled skills in 24 registry keys)
